title: Experiment Analysis Studio
summary: Analyze A/B tests with guardrails, segment-level reads, and fast experiment review artifacts.
knowledge_base: Experiment Analysis Studio is positioned as a Product Analytics starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Analyze A/B tests with guardrails, segment-level reads, and fast experiment review artifacts.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on experimentation, product, causal.
